message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam activationStyle rectangle

package "Central-Settlement" {
    participant "API" as API
    participant "api / Handler" as Handler
    participant "Application Layer\n(domain / service / facade)" as AppLayer
}

package "Storage" {
    participant "TigerBeetle Client" as TBClient
    participant "TigerBeetle Cluster" as TBCluster
    database "MySQL" as MySQL
}

participant "Mojaloop Adapter" as Mojaloop

note right of Mojaloop: Hub operator or\nDFSP interactions

note right of API: NodeJS interface\ninvokes REST API
note right of Handler: JSON request decoded &\nprocessed via handler
note right of AppLayer: Expose service functions &\nhandle database interactions

frame "Update Settlement" {
    Mojaloop -> API: 1 JSON\n(settlement data)
    API -> Handler: 2 Invoke handler
    Handler -> AppLayer: 3 Invoke application layer
    AppLayer -> MySQL: 4 Retrieve settlement data\n(excluding accounts)
    AppLayer -> TBCluster: 5 Retrieve accounts for all\nfor a settlement window Transfers
    AppLayer -> MySQL: 6 Update settlement data\n(excluding accounts)
    activate AppLayer
    AppLayer -> AppLayer: 7 Settlement state\nprocessing
    AppLayer -> TBClient: 8 Invoke account creation based on\nsettlement state of each Transfer
    TBClient -> TBCluster: 9 Create settlement accounts\n& return result
    TBClient --> AppLayer: 10 Return settlement result
    AppLayer -> MySQL: 11 Update final settlement state\n& return result
    deactivate AppLayer
    AppLayer --> Handler: 12 Return result
    Handler --> API: 13 Return result
    API --> Mojaloop: 14 Return result with\nsettlementData
}

@enduml
```
